brief_notes: Strong multi-agent output with 11 tables, detailed footnotes, runtime analysis section, and ~18 inline citations including method references (LoRA, RoPE, Mamba, Borzoi). Table audit PASS. Preserves full v3 statistical density (exact AUCs, IQRs, DeLong's p-values, Cohen's d, sample sizes throughout). Discussion is well-structured with bold thematic headers and nuanced interpretation. Approaches but does not exceed the v1 ceiling of 87 due to persistent N/A sparsity in results tables.
